title: Maximum Subarray Sum
description: Given an array of n integers, find the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray. A naive O(n²) approach works but an O(n) solution (Kadane's algorithm) wins in Optimization mode.
inputSpec: First line: integer n. Second line: n space-separated integers.
outputSpec: The maximum subarray sum. If all negative, return the largest single element.

botCodes.code:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
max_s = cur = a[0]
for x in a[1:]:
    cur = max(x, cur + x)
    max_s = max(max_s, cur)
print(max_s)

# Naive O(n²)
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
best = a[0]
for i in range(n):
    s = 0
    for j in range(i, n):
        s += a[j]
        if s > best: best = s
print(best)
